name: BLCaptain Style Cards
description_en: Turn Chinese text into eye-catching social image cards—Xiaohongshu 3:4 and WeChat covers—using three distinct house visual languages.
description_zh: 把中文内容做成第一眼惊艳的图文卡片组图——小红书 3:4 与公众号封面——提供三套独家视觉语言。
long_en: The agent reads the content and authors a brief.json (page splits, visual language, layout, pull-quotes); a deterministic engine then renders the cards and runs quality checks.
long_zh: 由 agent 读懂内容并撰写 brief.json(分页、视觉语言、版式、金句),再交由确定性引擎渲染卡片并做质量校验。
sec_note_en: Generates local image files for publishing; review cards before posting.
sec_note_zh: 生成用于发布的本地图片文件;发布前请审阅成片。
